title: Innovaccer partners with Infinia to develop Abu Dhabi’s AI-driven healthcare core
summary: The partnership seeks to unify healthcare data and convert it into actionable insights that healthcare providers, insurance companies, and government agencies can leverage.
contentHtml:
UAE—Innovaccer Inc., a healthcare artificial intelligence company, and Infinia Technologies, a digital transformation firm operating under Abu Dhabi’s International Holding Company (IHC) Group, have forged a strategic partnership designed to accelerate healthcare innovation across the United Arab Emirates.

The alliance represents a shared vision to establish a digitally advanced healthcare system in the UAE, positioning the nation’s medical sector toward value-based care models that prioritize patient outcomes.

By combining Innovaccer’s Healthcare Intelligence Platform with Infinia’s expertise in building secure, sovereign digital infrastructure, the two organizations aim to reshape how healthcare systems operate across the region.

Unifying Data for Better Patient Care

At its core, the partnership seeks to unify healthcare data and convert it into actionable insights that healthcare providers, insurance companies, and government agencies can leverage.

This integrated approach enables medical professionals to make faster clinical decisions, streamline operations, and ultimately deliver better patient experiences.

The collaboration directly supports Abu Dhabi’s growing reputation as a global hub for healthcare innovation and advanced life sciences.

Abhinav Shashank, co-founder and CEO of Innovaccer, emphasized the transformative potential of the partnership.

“The UAE represents one of the world’s most progressive healthcare ecosystems, and Abu Dhabi is rapidly becoming an international center for healthcare innovation,” he stated.

Shashank highlighted how the alliance contributes to nation-building efforts by establishing a unified, intelligence-driven healthcare framework that promotes sustainable delivery of medical services for future generations.

Building Trust Through Secure Infrastructure

Infinia Technologies brings deep regional expertise in developing trusted digital platforms that support large-scale national transformation initiatives.

As part of the IHC ecosystem, the company specializes in managing complex enterprise modernization programs across the Middle East.

Arif Mohammad Khan, CEO of Infinia Technologies, pointed out the importance of the partnership in today’s healthcare landscape.

“Healthcare is entering a defining era where data, intelligence, and digital trust will shape patient experience and the sustainability of healthcare systems,” he noted.

Khan emphasized that the collaboration merges advanced healthcare artificial intelligence capabilities with secure digital platform infrastructure, unlocking new possibilities for patient-centered care.

Long-Term Vision for Healthcare Transformation

The partnership ensures that both organizations will work on organized projects to improve how healthcare providers connect with each other, speed up the use of digital health solutions, and create a strong system that supports ongoing changes in healthcare across the UAE.

Together, Innovaccer and Infinia aim to empower healthcare institutions with intelligent digital tools while advancing Abu Dhabi’s ambitious vision to lead globally in next-generation healthcare delivery.
